# RemotionUI

> Production-ready motion for Remotion. Source you own. The npm package is a CLI; components install as editable source in the user's project.

## Canonical URLs

- Site: https://remotionui.com
- Docs: https://remotionui.com/docs
- Component catalog: https://remotionui.com/docs/components
- AI guide: https://remotionui.com/docs/ai
- Full LLM guide: https://remotionui.com/llms-full.txt
- Component index: https://remotionui.com/ai/components.json
- Recipe index: https://remotionui.com/ai/recipes.json
- Agent prompt: https://remotionui.com/ai/remotionui-agent.md
- Registry: https://remotionui.com/r/index.json

## Use RemotionUI for

- Animated captions and social clips
- Counters, metrics, charts, and data stories
- Lower thirds, title cards, quote cards, and callouts
- Audio visualizers and podcast clips
- Transitions, intros, showcases, and reel templates

## Recipes (6)

- Captioned social video (`captioned-social-video`): npx remotion-ui@latest add --recipe captioned-social-video
- Creator reel (`creator-reel`): npx remotion-ui@latest add --recipe creator-reel
- Data story (`data-story`): npx remotion-ui@latest add --recipe data-story
- Podcast clip (`podcast-clip`): npx remotion-ui@latest add --recipe podcast-clip
- Product intro (`product-intro`): npx remotion-ui@latest add --recipe product-intro
- Lower-third scene (`lower-third-scene`): npx remotion-ui@latest add --recipe lower-third-scene

## Flagship compositions

- intro
- showcase
- hero-loop
- social-clip
- tutorial-clip
- data-story
- creator-reel
- podcast-clip

## CLI

```bash
npx remotion-ui@latest init my-video
cd my-video
npx remotion-ui@latest search -q caption
npx remotion-ui@latest add social-clip caption-highlight lower-third
```

## Agent rules

- Use Remotion docs for framework fundamentals: https://www.remotion.dev/docs
- Use RemotionUI for source-installed components.
- Run `npx remotion-ui@latest add <component>` before importing.
- Import from local source paths, not from `remotion-ui`.
- Animate with Remotion frame APIs, not CSS transitions.
